rows.label: qev051404_MSG0001
rows.name: It seems... we both managed to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0002
rows.name:
You did well. I don't have the words to
express my gratitude for your efforts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0003
rows.name:
If it weren't for your skills, this place
might have fallen into enemy hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems we were a bit too relaxed about our
defenses against the Growth, simply because it
was an incident in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0005
rows.name:
In that sense as well, your success
in seizing the new weapon's blueprints
is immensely significant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0006
rows.name:
We need to analyze the blueprints in
detail to understand the Growth's
technological capabilities and strategy, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0007
rows.name:
I promise we will
destroy them afterward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0008
rows.name:
From the start, we never had any intention
of using Growth weaponry, anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0009
rows.name:
But after all the help you've
given us, I didn't want to cause
you any unnecessary worry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0010
rows.name: You really saved us this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051404_MSG0011
rows.name:
I promise once again that we Lars will
spare no effort in cooperating with
Earthlings to defeat the Growth.[ST:wait ]
